headline: Phalhala or Bust: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Phalhala or Bust carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 69.36, led by Ashton Jeanty, Sam LaPorta, and Rome Odunze. The immediate preseason decision is not broad roster turnover; it is whether the QB slot currently occupied by C.J. Stroud (49.2 C-AVI) can be improved without weakening the verified core.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Ashton Jeanty (97.0), Sam LaPorta (86.2), and Rome Odunze (77.5). That concentration gives Phalhala or Bust a defined top-end identity.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Among the eight verified championship-lineup slots, C.J. Stroud is the lowest C-AVI starter at 49.2. Any preseason acquisition should be measured against that exact lineup threshold, not against the bottom of the bench.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 10 offensive players, leaving 2 offensive players outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 73.57, which should be used to judge whether consolidation improves the lineup more than it reduces flexibility.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 10 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active. There is no knowledge-backed reason for an emergency replacement move this week.

sections.title: Draft Assets
sections.body: No franchise-labelled draft asset was found in the approved knowledge files. The summary does not infer ownership from roster position or prior conversations.
